channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18181] conf-sanity test_32h: FAIL: verify quota failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/aa8332ca-c633-4c28-b8df-d69cfb00c781

test_32h failed with the following error:

FAIL: verify quota failed 
test_32h failed with 1

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/107218 - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_9.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/107218 - 4.18.0-513.24.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_32h - test_32h failed with 1
item.summary: conf-sanity test_32h: FAIL: verify quota failed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61865/
Subject: LU-18181 tests: replace "$LCTL pool_new" with pool_add()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 54bcdd5e19d1de4fd483f412e7fa68e50c487951

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61865
Subject: LU-18181 tests: replace "$LCTL pool_new" with pool_add()
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: ad9a6f39181812777c54d67a8235830b753c4df3

lfs quota: cannot open /proc/fs/lustre/lov/t32fs-clilov-ffff9d65a2683000/pools/testpool: No such file or directory (2)
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 0

I.e. llapi_get_poolmembers called from print_obd_quota fails because cannot access to "t32fs.testpool" information.

I'm not sure about the exact problem why it happens, but one of things to try is to use "pool_add()" instead of "$LCTL pool new" to check that the pool has been successfully created.

The conf-sanity/32h subtest passed consistently on the recent master builds in full group test sessions.
It only failed intermittently on patch review review-dne-zfs-part-3 test sessions.

Failed 10x in the past two weeks on master:

Disk quotas for usr quota_usr (uid 60000):
     Filesystem  kbytes  bquota  blimit  bgrace   files  iquota  ilimit  igrace 
/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre       3       0   40960       -       2       0       4       - 
  t32fs-MDT0000      1*       -       1       -      1*       -       1       - 
  t32fs-MDT0001      2*       -       2       -      1*       -       4       - 
  t32fs-OST0000       1       -    4096       -       1       -       0       - 
  t32fs-OST0001       1       -    4096       -       1       -       0       - 
Total allocated inode limit: 5, total allocated block limit: 8192
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
Setting t32fs.quota.mdt from none to ug
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param t32fs.quota.mdt='ug'
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
Waiting 90s for 'ug'
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-MDT0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
Setting t32fs.quota.ost from none to ug
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl conf_param t32fs.quota.ost='ug'
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
Waiting 90s for 'ug'
CMD: onyx-70vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osd-zfs.t32fs-OST0000.quota_slave.enabled
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups: 60000
 [dd] [if=/dev/urandom] [bs=1M] [of=/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_new] [count=40] [oflag=sync]
dd: failed to open '/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_new': Disk quota exceeded
running as uid/gid/euid/egid 60000/60000/60000/60000, groups: 60000
 [createmany] [-m] [/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_] [4]
mknod(/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_0) error: Disk quota exceeded
total: 0 create in 0.00 seconds: 0.00 ops/second
unlink(/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/t32_qf_0) error: No such file or directory
total: 0 unlinks in 0 seconds: -nan unlinks/second
Disk quotas for usr quota_usr (uid 60000):
     Filesystem  kbytes  bquota  blimit  bgrace   files  iquota  ilimit  igrace 
/tmp/t32/mnt/lustre/remote_dir/pool_dir     [2]       0   20480       -       2       0       0       - 
Pool: t32fs.testpool
lfs quota: cannot open /proc/fs/lustre/lov/t32fs-clilov-ffff9d65a2683000/pools/testpool: No such file or directory (2)
Total allocated inode limit: 0, total allocated block limit: 0
1 Some errors happened when getting quota info. Some devices may be not working or deactivated. The data in "[]" is inaccurate.
-u 60000  space:[2]
1 Some errors happened when getting quota info. Some devices may be not working or deactivated. The data in "[]" is inaccurate.
bspace_pool, act:[2]
1 Some errors happened when getting quota info. Some devices may be not working or deactivated. The data in "[]" is inaccurate., exp:3
 conf-sanity test_32h: @@@@@@ FAIL: verify quota failed

https://testing.whamcloud.com/sub_tests/17f2416e-530f-4271-99ca-22a29c54a057

Failed 12x in the past week on master and master-next:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/09a8e59b-4c5e-49e3-afb6-144bc8d0c72e

more on master:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/045f32da-d133-42d1-aeec-974c7fa450fc
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c0768c7f-0075-45c5-b211-9f1d0a3cf06a
